nodes.name: .gitignore
nodes.summary: Git ignore configuration excluding build artifacts, dependencies, and editor configuration files from version control.

nodes.name: README.md
nodes.summary: Project documentation describing the React + Vite template setup with information about available plugins (Oxc and SWC) and guidance on expanding ESLint configuration for production use.

nodes.name: package.json
nodes.summary: NPM package manifest defining project metadata, build scripts (dev, build, lint, preview), and dependencies including React 19.2.7, Vite, and ESLint plugins.

nodes.name: eslint.config.js
nodes.summary: ESLint configuration using flat config format with recommended rules from @eslint/js, react-hooks plugin, and react-refresh plugin for optimal React development.
nodes.languageNotes: Uses ESLint flat config (v9+) with defineConfig API and globalIgnores for dist directory.

nodes.name: vite.config.js
nodes.summary: Vite build configuration enabling React plugin for HMR (Hot Module Replacement) and optimized development/production builds.

nodes.name: index.html
nodes.summary: HTML entry point defining the DOM root element and importing the main application module with module-type script tag enabling ES6 imports.
nodes.languageNotes: Root div with id='root' serves as React mount point; script type='module' enables ES6 imports.

nodes.name: package-lock.json
nodes.summary: NPM lockfile (lockfileVersion 3) freezing exact versions of dependencies including React, Vite, ESLint, Babel utilities, and supporting libraries for reproducible builds.

nodes.name: hero.png
nodes.summary: Hero banner image used as a visual asset in the React application landing page or hero section.

nodes.name: react.svg
nodes.summary: React logo SVG asset used for branding and UI components throughout the application.

nodes.name: vite.svg
nodes.summary: Vite build tool logo SVG asset used in UI components or documentation.

nodes.name: settings.local.json
nodes.summary: Claude Code project configuration permitting specific PowerShell and Bash commands for the Understand-Anything knowledge graph analysis pipeline, including file operations, script execution, and graph merging.

nodes.name: favicon.svg
nodes.summary: Project favicon SVG with gradient-filled geometric logo using purple (#863bff) and cyan (#47bfff) colors with blur filters and mask effects.

nodes.name: icons.svg
nodes.summary: SVG sprite sheet containing social media and documentation icon symbols (Bluesky, Discord, GitHub, X/Twitter, documentation, social) used throughout the application.

nodes.name: App.css
nodes.summary: Styling for the App component featuring responsive layout design with CSS Grid, Flexbox, transitions, and dark mode support for hero section, counter button, and multi-section navigation.
nodes.languageNotes: Uses SCSS-style nesting syntax via CSS nesting spec with media queries for mobile responsiveness and CSS custom properties for theming.

nodes.name: index.css
nodes.summary: Global CSS stylesheet defining design system with CSS custom properties (colors, fonts, shadows), responsive typography, and light/dark mode theme variables applied to root element.

nodes.name: App
nodes.summary: Main React component rendering the application UI with interactive counter button, hero section with framework logos, and documentation/social navigation sections using SVG icon sprites.

nodes.name: App.jsx
nodes.summary: Primary React application component combining state management via useState, styled UI layout with imported CSS and image assets, and dynamic SVG icon integration for navigation sections.

nodes.name: main.jsx
nodes.summary: Application entry point that initializes React 18 root, imports global styles, renders App component wrapped in StrictMode for development error detection.
